briefs.title: Short-Term Rental Rules in BC Now Cover First Nation Laws — Operators Must Comply
briefs.summary: BC updated its short-term rental rules to include First Nation laws alongside municipal bylaws, and shifted some review decisions from a 'responsible official' to a central registrar (a government official who manages the licensing registry).
briefs.action_required: Check if your short-term rental property falls under any First Nation laws and ensure your listing complies.

key_dates.label: BC short-term rental First Nation law rules take effect
